arts.ttl: Why isn't Dest or Lozano playing for PSV against PSG in the Champions League?
arts.sum: USMNT defender Sergiño Dest remains a long-term absentee for PSV Eindhoven, who visit Paris Saint-Germain on matchday three of the UEFA Champions League today . Dest is joined on the sidelines by Mexican forward Hirving ‘Chucky’ Lozano, who hasn’t played for PSV since suffering a muscle injury in early September.

arts.ttl: PSG vs PSV Eindhoven: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are aiming to return to winning ways in the Champions League as they face Eredivisie champions PSV Eindhoven in the French capital on Tuesday night. PSG, like PSV, lead their domestic league but the likes of Monaco and Marseille are also competing fiercely at the summit.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti Takes Subtle Swipe at Luis Enrique in Latest Remarks
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain manager Luis Enrique had Real Madrid standout Kylian Mbappé for one season, and a recent video of him coaching the Frenchman went viral. Last season in the UEFA Champions League, Enrique had a video coaching session with the 25-year-old while analyzing the match against FC Barcelona. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique Reveals Which Real Madrid Star Deserves to Win Ballon D’Or
arts.sum: The Ballon d’Or will be presented this month, and there’s no clear-cut favorite to win the honor. Nonetheless, while speaking to TNT Sports Brazil, Paris Saint-Germain manager Luis Enrique shared who he thinks will win the honor.
